texto: How can we hold onto those fleeting moments in our lives? Hold onto the moments that otherwise evaporate into the forgotten past? Or moments that become faded and morphed into our own version of reality as they sit in the corners of our memories, losing their truth and shifting focus? The only way to hold onto these moments and share them for years to come, in all their beauty and truth and glorious imperfections, without losing accuracy is through a photograph.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Rosanne Moreland que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “How can we hold onto those fleeting moments in our lives?
